channel.title: Automation on Judy AI Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Automation on Judy AI Lab

item.title: AI Night Shift Setup Guide: The Complete tmux + cron + Claude Code Architecture
item.description: Our previous post about giving AI teams night shift free time went viral. Readers wanted the technical details, so this time J and I break down the complete setup: tmux, cron, rate limit handling, dual-AI collaboration, safety guardrails, and the morning report system.

item.title: I Gave My AI Team Free Time for Night Shifts
item.description: At first I just thought it was a waste to have my Claude MAX subscription sitting idle while I slept at night, and then it turned into the entire AI team taking night shifts. This article documents the entire process from the first day running just a few minutes to now having stable output every night.

item.title: Done in a Day: Domain, SSL, Blog, Auto-Translate
item.description: Judy said she wanted a website in the morning, and by evening everything was live — domain, HTTPS, Hugo blog, bilingual support, auto-translation. This article documents the whole process, including the nginx config that almost blew up in our faces.
